# Cassia Accountancy

> UK small business accountancy firm specialising in bookkeeping, tax returns, Making Tax Digital, payroll and compliance.

## About

Cassia Accountancy helps sole traders, freelancers, landlords and small limited companies across the United Kingdom. The practice is led by Sarah Cassia Davies MAAT, an AAT-qualified accountant with over 25 years of experience.

## Services

- Making Tax Digital (MTD readiness, software setup, quarterly submissions)
- Bookkeeping and accounts
- Self assessment tax returns
- Accounts and compliance (year-end accounts, VAT, management reporting)
- Payroll (PAYE, RTI, pension auto-enrolment)

## Who we help

Sole traders, freelancers, landlords, small limited companies, start-ups, self-employed professionals, service-based businesses and tradespeople.
